item.title: The Cold Case That Took Decades To Solve
item.description: In December 1984, Jonelle Matthews disappeared from her home in Greeley after returning from a school concert. Her case remained unsolved for more than three decades until advances in the investigation led to an arrest and conviction, bringing long-awaited answers to one of Colorado's most enduring cold cases.

media:content.media:title: The Cold Case That Took Decades To Solve
media:content.media:description: In December 1984, Jonelle Matthews disappeared from her home in Greeley after returning from a school concert. Her case remained unsolved for more than three decades until advances in the investigation led to an arrest and conviction, bringing long-awaited answers to one of Colorado's most enduring cold cases.

item.title: he Plan That Ended In A Family Tragedy
item.description: In 2016, Joel Guy Jr. was convicted of murdering his parents, Joel Guy Sr. and Lisa Guy, in Knoxville, Tennessee. Prosecutors presented evidence of extensive planning, financial motives, and attempts to conceal the crime. The case remains one of Tennessee's most widely discussed family homicide investigations.

media:content.media:title: he Plan That Ended In A Family Tragedy
media:content.media:description: In 2016, Joel Guy Jr. was convicted of murdering his parents, Joel Guy Sr. and Lisa Guy, in Knoxville, Tennessee. Prosecutors presented evidence of extensive planning, financial motives, and attempts to conceal the crime. The case remains one of Tennessee's most widely discussed family homicide investigations.

item.title: One 911 Call Changed Everything
item.description: In 2008, Denise Amber Lee was abducted from her home in Florida and managed to make a desperate phone call while being transported. The investigation highlighted critical failures in emergency dispatch procedures and led to significant reforms aimed at improving how 911 calls are handled across the state.

media:content.media:title: One 911 Call Changed Everything
media:content.media:description: In 2008, Denise Amber Lee was abducted from her home in Florida and managed to make a desperate phone call while being transported. The investigation highlighted critical failures in emergency dispatch procedures and led to significant reforms aimed at improving how 911 calls are handled across the state.

item.title: The Marriage That Ended In A High Profile Trial
item.description: In 2003, Susan Wright was charged in connection with the death of her husband, Jeff Wright, in Houston, Texas. The case drew national attention as the defense argued years of domestic abuse while prosecutors challenged that account, leading to a closely watched trial and years of appeals.

media:content.media:title: The Marriage That Ended In A High Profile Trial
media:content.media:description: In 2003, Susan Wright was charged in connection with the death of her husband, Jeff Wright, in Houston, Texas. The case drew national attention as the defense argued years of domestic abuse while prosecutors challenged that account, leading to a closely watched trial and years of appeals.

item.title: A Father’s Revenge Played Out On Live TV
item.description: In 1984, Gary Plauché confronted Jeff Doucet at an airport in Baton Rouge as television cameras recorded the moment. The incident followed the kidnapping and abuse of Plauché's son and sparked a nationwide debate about justice, grief, and vigilantism.

media:content.media:title: A Father’s Revenge Played Out On Live TV
media:content.media:description: In 1984, Gary Plauché confronted Jeff Doucet at an airport in Baton Rouge as television cameras recorded the moment. The incident followed the kidnapping and abuse of Plauché's son and sparked a nationwide debate about justice, grief, and vigilantism.

item.title: The Chilling Chronicles of Chad Doerman's Betrayal
item.description: In June 2023, Chad Doerman was charged after three of his young sons were found dead at the family's home in Monroe Township. Investigators described the incident as carefully planned, and the case drew nationwide attention. Court proceedings continue as prosecutors pursue the death penalty.

media:content.media:title: The Chilling Chronicles of Chad Doerman's Betrayal
media:content.media:description: In June 2023, Chad Doerman was charged after three of his young sons were found dead at the family's home in Monroe Township. Investigators described the incident as carefully planned, and the case drew nationwide attention. Court proceedings continue as prosecutors pursue the death penalty.

item.title: The Hidden Double Life Of Dennis Nilsen
item.description: Dennis Nilsen lived a quiet life in London while concealing a long series of crimes that remained hidden for years. In 1983, a plumbing issue at his apartment led investigators to uncover evidence that exposed his activities. The investigation became one of the United Kingdom’s most notorious criminal cases and resulted in a life sentence.

media:content.media:title: The Hidden Double Life Of Dennis Nilsen
media:content.media:description: Dennis Nilsen lived a quiet life in London while concealing a long series of crimes that remained hidden for years. In 1983, a plumbing issue at his apartment led investigators to uncover evidence that exposed his activities. The investigation became one of the United Kingdom’s most notorious criminal cases and resulted in a life sentence.
